rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM ROY HORSTMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Petition For Order That Personal Representative; 1) Pay Outstanding Attorneys' Fees; 2) Liquidate Real Property As Necessary To Pay Attorneys' Fees; And 3) Approve Extraordinary Fees
rulings.Rulings: Lasse Lidstrom's Demurrer to Albertson & Davidson LLP's (A&D) Petition for Order that Personal Representative: 1. Pay Outstanding Attorneys' Fees; 2. Liquidate Real Property as Necessary to Pay Attorneys' Fees; and 3. Approve Extraodinary Fees (Petition) is OVERRULED. The Petition is not a commencement of proceedings against Lidstrom for recovery of fees, i.e., a fee dispute pursuant to contract, such that it is subject to the State Bar Act, or, more specifically, the arbitration clause set forth in Bus. & Prof. Code Section 6201. A&D has petitioned the Court for its earned compensation pursuant to a contingency fee arrangement approved by the Court on August 29, 2012. A&D has followed the appropriate procedure for filing of the Petition for a distribution of earned attorney's fees, which it seeks as a charge against the Estate of William Horstman, not against Lidstrom in his capacity as personal representative or as an individual. (Prob. Code Sections 10811, 10830.) The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than December 9, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
